task:
Build this app in Clear:

**Role-Based Access Control** (Level 8)

Build an API with role-based access. Users have roles (admin/editor/viewer). POST /api/articles creates articles (editors and admins only). DELETE /api/articles/:id deletes (admins only). GET /api/articles lists all (anyone with auth). Viewers can read but not create or delete.

Starting skeleton:
```clear
build for javascript backend

create a Users table:
  email, required, unique
  password, required
  role, required

create a
final_source:
build for javascript backend
database is local memory

create a Users table:
  email, required, unique
  password, required
  role, required

create a Articles table:
  title, required
  body
  author_id

# Register endpoint - create new user with role
when user calls POST /api/register sending user:
  saved = save user to Users
  send back saved with status 201

# Login endpoint - validate credentials and return token
when user calls POST /api/login sending credentials:
  found = look up Users with credentials's email
  guard found is not empty or 'Invalid email'
  guard credentials's password is found's password or 'Invalid password'
  token = 'jwt_' + found's email
  send back { token is token } with status 200

# Get articles - authenticated users only (check for Authorization header)
when user calls GET /api/articles:
  requires login
  articles = get all Articles
  send back articles

# Create article - editors and admins only
when user calls POST /api/articles sending article:
  requires login
  guard caller's role is 'admin' or caller's role is 'editor' or 'Only editors and admins can create articles'
  article's author_id is caller's id
  saved = save article to Articles
  send back saved with status 201

# Delete article - admins only
when user calls DELETE /api/articles/:id:
  requires login
  guard caller's role is 'admin' or 'Only admins can delete articles'
  delete Articles with this id
  send back 'deleted' with status 204
